title: Rtp+
description: RTP+ is a GUI-based random teleport plugin for Paper/Spigot that lets players pick a world and randomly teleport safely with configurable radii, cooldown tiers, and countdown safety checks. It’s fully configurable
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afdfb86a5a4b09baa7a77326eee64687444a830.jpeg)
# 🧭 RTP+ — Random Teleport GUI & Safety System

  **RTP+ is a modern, GUI-driven random teleport plugin for Paper/Spigot that lets players choose worlds and teleport
  safely.**
  **It delivers a clean world-select GUI, per-world radii, cooldown tiers, and safe-location scanning with full config
  control in config.yml.**

  Built for fast UX, safe landings, and flexible server rules.

  ## ✨ GUI-First Random Teleport

  **One-click world selection GUI
  Configurable title, size, filler items, and sounds
  Hide disabled worlds automatically**

  ## 🧩 Smart World Targeting

  **Per-world items with custom material, name, lore, slot
  Per-world min/max radius (use world border when max radius is 0)
  World-border aware safe search**

  ## 🛡️ Safe Teleport Scanning

  **Safe-location scan with blacklist blocks
  Max-attempt limit + fallback search
  ActionBar scanning feedback**

  ## ⏱️ Cooldowns & Countdown Safety

  **Per-rank cooldown tiers via rtp.cooldown.<rank>
  Teleport countdown with ActionBar updates
  Optional cancel-on-move and cancel-on-damage**

  ## 🎨 Fully Configurable in config.yml

  **All messages configurable
  All sounds configurable
  Blacklist blocks configurable
  World enable/disable toggles**

  ## 🧾 Commands

  | Command | Description |
  | --- | --- |
  | /rtp | Open the RTP GUI |
  | /rtp reload | Reload config |

  ## 🔐 Permissions

  | Permission | Description |
  | --- | --- |
  | rtp.use | Use /rtp |
  | rtp.reload | Reload config |
  | rtp.world.overworld | RTP in Overworld |
  | rtp.world.nether | RTP in Nether |
  | rtp.world.end | RTP in End |
  | rtp.cooldown.vip1 | Use vip1 cooldown tier |
  | rtp.cooldown.vip2 | Use vip2 cooldown tier |

### Server Ip

| Rtp+ Plugin              | Server          |
| -------------------- | -------------------- |
| This Plugin is available in this server   | play.hydraz.online            |
